scene_description:
### Foreground to Background Description  

**Left Foreground:**  
- A white stucco building wall (textured surface) with a black metal balcony railing (wrought iron design) on the upper level, visible at the top left corner. The wall has shadows from nearby foliage.  
- A low, continuous white plaster wall runs parallel to the road along the left edge, extending from the foreground into the midground. The wall is approximately 1 meter high with a smooth, flat top. A small black metal gate is integrated into the wall at mid-foreground.  
- At the base of the white wall, a narrow strip of green grass and scattered small plants are visible.  

**Right Foreground:**  
- A large tree with a thick, light-brown trunk (darker patches at the base) and dense green foliage, positioned on the right edge of the image. The tree casts shadows on the road.  
- A partial green vehicle (SUV or small truck) is parked on the right side of the road, visible from the front fender to the front wheel. The vehicle has a white front bumper and a green body.  

**Road Surface & Markings (Center):**  
- A narrow asphalt road stretches from the foreground to the background. The road surface is gray, smooth, and well-maintained, with no visible lane markings (no white or yellow lines).  
- The road has a slight curve to the right in the distance. The left edge of the road features a low concrete curb, while the right edge is a dirt shoulder with no curb.  

**Left Midground (beyond white wall):**  
- Behind the white wall, multiple small trees and dense green shrubs line the road. The foliage includes young trees with thin trunks and broad leaves.  
- A partially visible white building (flat roof) is situated beyond the greenery in the midground, to the left of center.  

**Right Midground (beyond large tree):**  
- The right side of the road transitions into a sloping, dry area with sparse grass and scattered brown vegetation.  
- Several tall trees with green foliage line the right side of the road, extending into the background. The trees have thin trunks and dense canopies.  

**Background:**  
- A hill rises in the distance, covered in a mix of dry brown grass and patches of green shrubs. The hill slopes upward from the left center to the center background.  
- The sky is overcast with light gray clouds, visible above the hill and trees.  

**Additional Elements (all visible):**  
- **Text & Signs:** No visible signs, road name markers, shop signs, banners, or stickers on poles.  
- **Infrastructure:** No utility poles, bollards, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails.  
- **Vehicles & Plates:** Only the partial green vehicle (right foreground) is visible; no license plate is readable.  
- **Buildings & Architecture:** The white building on the left has a stucco facade and a black metal balcony railing. The wall is a continuous plaster fence.  
- **Vegetation & Terrain:** Deciduous trees (green leaves) dominate both sides of the road. The hill in the background is dry with sparse vegetation. The terrain slopes gently to the left and downward on the right.  
- **Driving Side:** The parked vehicle is on the right side of the road, indicating right-hand traffic.
